packs.name: Aerial Warfare Expansion
packs.author: DINOForge
packs.description: Fantasy aerial warfare expansion adding flying units and airfields to vanilla DINO factions. Compatible with vanilla DINO - adds content without replacing base game factions. Content features: - 12 aerial units: griffon riders, pegasus cavalry, wyvern scouts, hippogriff knights, harpy raiders, dragon whelps, phoenix hatchlings, cloud giants, roc patrols, storm crow ambushers, celestial messengers, and shadow wing strikers - 6 airfields: aviary (tier 1), wyvern roost (tier 2), griffon tower (tier 2), phoenix nest (tier 3), dragon cave (tier 3), and cloud citadel (tier 4) - Anti-air defenses: ballista tower, thunder cannon, mage tower (anti-air spells) - 3 aerial doctrines: sky dominance, cloud strike, and aerial superiority Units use the DINOForge Aviation subsystem (aerial: config, behavior_tags: [Aerial]).

packs.name: Economy Balanced
packs.author: DINOForge Team
packs.description: Defines resource types, economy profiles, and trade routes for the DINOForge economy system. Does NOT change vanilla DINO's default economy; this pack layers on top of it. Standard profile (economy-standard): all multipliers at 1.0x — a reference baseline matching default game rates. Starting resources: 200 food, 150 wood, 100 stone, 50 iron, 0 gold. Useful as a no-change anchor when combining multiple economy packs. Abundance profile (economy-abundance): boosted output for aggressive expansion. Production: food +50%, wood +40%, stone +30%, iron +20%. Consumption: food +20%, wood/stone +10%. Starting resources doubled (400 food, 300 wood, 200 stone, 100 iron, 25 gold). Storage +50%, building costs -10%, worker efficiency +20%. Trade rates +15%. Trade routes (8 total): 4 resource-to-gold exports (wood 10:1, food 12:1, stone 8:1, iron 5:1), 1 gold-to-iron import (2:1), and 3 cross-resource swaps (wood→stone 1.5:1, food→wood 1.2:1, stone→iron 2.5:1). All routes have per-transaction caps and cooldowns. These rates are pack-defined, not vanilla values.

packs.name: Example Total Conversion
packs.author: DINOForge Team
packs.description: Minimal example pack demonstrating a total conversion mod in DINOForge. This pack demonstrates: - Universe Bible system with custom faction and units - YAML schema validation and content loading - Multi-domain registration (factions, units) - Bundle reference patterns (visual_asset IDs) The Sentinels faction is a simple example faction with one unit type. This pack is ideal for mod authors learning DINOForge structure and patterns.

packs.name: Hello World Example
packs.author: DINOForge
packs.description: A minimal example mod pack demonstrating core DINOForge concepts: - Custom faction declaration (HelloWorld faction) - Unit override (Swordsman stat boost) - Setting configuration in pack.yaml This pack is safe to enable alongside other mods. It adds no conflicts and loads early (load_order: 50) to ensure stable integration. Use this as a template for your first pack. Every file is documented with "Why this matters" explanations.

packs.name: Modern Warfare
packs.author: DINOForge
packs.description: A total conversion replacing DINO's fantasy armies with contemporary military forces. Deploy modern infantry, vehicles, and artillery in asymmetric warfare between NATO-inspired Western Alliance and a technologically-advanced adversary. Factions included: - Western Alliance: disciplined combined-arms force with strong research and defensive infrastructure - Classic Enemy: adaptive force employing human-wave tactics and scorched-earth doctrine Content features: - 12 unique units per faction: riflemen, squads, special forces, gunners, mortars, scouts, APCs, armor - 4 doctrines: combined arms, human wave, fortified defense, asymmetric tactics - 4 campaign waves: early game, mid game, armor support, and final assault - Modern weapons and ballistic systems Gameplay shifts from medieval pacing to tactical modern warfare with emphasis on combined-arms coordination.

packs.name: Star Wars - Clone Wars
packs.author: DINOForge
packs.description: A total conversion transporting DINO into the Star Wars universe during the Clone Wars. Command the clone trooper legions of the Galactic Republic against the mechanized forces of the Separatist Confederacy. Factions included: - Galactic Republic: disciplined elite clone army with Jedi commanders, strong morale, and specialized forces - Confederacy (CIS): mechanized swarm doctrine with rolling thunder tactics and droid legions Content features: - 26 units per side: clone troopers, arc troopers, heavy troops, vehicle crews, ARF troopers, speeder pilots, jedi knights, commandos, battle droids, super battle droids - 20 buildings: clone facilities, weapons factories, vehicle bays, guard towers, shield generators, command centers, supply stations, tibanna refineries, research labs, blast walls - 6 doctrines: elite discipline, jedi leadership, defensive formation, mechanized attrition, rolling thunder, swarm protocol - 1 weapon set: blasters and energy weapons - Clone Wars wave templates for themed campaigns Visual assets: placeholder - community contributions welcome. See assets/ASSET_PIPELINE.md for the TABS-style art guide, free CC0/CC-BY source list (Kenney.nl, PolyPizza, Sketchfab), and Unity 2021.3 + Addressables import workflow. Experience the conflict between biological discipline and mechanical coordination in a galaxy far, far away.

packs.name: Vanilla DINO
packs.author: DINOForge Team
packs.description: Canonical reference pack containing all 100+ vanilla DINO units, 6 factions, buildings, weapons, and doctrines. Use this as the base for all mod unit/faction mappings.
